problem id: 4510a429
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) OR NOT SHR(7)

examples:
  10101110 -> 11111111
  11000110 -> 11111111
  11100000 -> 11111110
  00111111 -> 11111111
  10001011 -> 11111111
  00001001 -> 11111111
  00011011 -> 11111111
  10000110 -> 11111111

query: 00000010
predicted answer: 11111111
